translation: 来自加里克·皮尔斯的信
context: { "reference name": "Letter from Garrick Pierce", "display name": "Letter from Garrick Pierce", "description": "\"I hope you understand... I would've never contacted you unless I had no other choice. I know the truth behind McCoy's true parentage. And I'm aware of how vital this information is to you. As you know, my execution is scheduled for next month. And I'm running out of time. I want to trade this information with you. In exchange, you will grant me my freedom. Meet me within the private Prayer Room within the Grand Cathedral of the Scaled Lord at 2:00 PM. You will save me from my fate, or else...\"", "type": "", "school": "", "incantation": "", "gesture": "", "duration": "", "concentration": "", "series": "", "tag": "", "token position": "", "battle map size": "" }

{
  "reference name": "Celeste's Testimony",
  "display name": "Celeste's Testimony",
  "description": "During the afternoon of the murder, Celeste McCoy heard a suspicious sound and investigated the hallway leading to the Prayer Room. There she saw Aria Steelwind fighting the guards. \r\n\r\nAria didn’t respond to Celeste’s questions and attacked her as well. The two fought to a standstill and Aria pushed past her. When Celeste arrived at the Prayer Room, she found Tyrion and Aria unconscious. And Pierce was already dead. She didn’t see Beatrice Frega at any point during the altercation.\r",
  "type": "",
  "school": "",
  "incantation": "",
  "gesture": "",
  "duration": "",
  "concentration": "",
  "series": "",
  "tag": "",
  "token position": "",
  "battle map size": ""
}

original:
During the afternoon of the murder, Celeste McCoy heard a suspicious sound and investigated the hallway leading to the Prayer Room. There she saw Aria Steelwind fighting the guards. 

Aria didn’t respond to Celeste’s questions and attacked her as well. The two fought to a standstill and Aria pushed past her. When Celeste arrived at the Prayer Room, she found Tyrion and Aria unconscious. And Pierce was already dead. She didn’t see Beatrice Frega at any point during the altercation.

translation: 尸检报告：洛伊德·冯·桑克图斯
context: { "reference name": "Autopsy Report: Lloyd von Sanctus", "display name": "Autopsy Report: Lloyd von Sanctus", "description": "\"Died at 2:05PM. The cause of death was suffocation. The fire in the Common Room burnt the body too much to discern any specific wounds he might have suffered. However, a small trace of evocation magic and a burn mark were found on the victim’s left shoulder. This implies the body was hit with a fire-based evocation spell.\r\n\r\nTraces of abjuration magic were found on and around the body.”\r", "type": "", "school": "", "incantation": "", "gesture": "", "duration": "", "concentration": "", "series": "", "tag": "", "token position": "", "battle map size": "" }

original: "Died at 2:05PM. The cause of death was suffocation. The fire in the Common Room burnt the body too much to discern any specific wounds he might have suffered. However, a small trace of evocation magic and a burn mark were found on the victim’s left shoulder. This implies the body was hit with a fire-based evocation spell. Traces of abjuration magic were found on and around the body.”
context: { "reference name": "Autopsy Report: Lloyd von Sanctus", "display name": "Autopsy Report: Lloyd von Sanctus", "description": "\"Died at 2:05PM. The cause of death was suffocation. { "reference name": "The Murder of Von Sanctus", "display name": "The Murder of Von Sanctus", "description": "Aria Steelwind attacked von Sanctus with a Fire Bolt in the Common Room. He reacted by casting Force Cage to protect himself. Seeing that she couldn’t break through it, she started a fire to eat all of the oxygen in the room. Von Sanctus was probably helpless as he suffocated from a lack of oxygen.", "type": "", "school": "", "incantation": "", "gesture": "", "duration": "", "concentration": "", "series": "", "tag": "", "token position": "", "battle map size": "" }

original: Aria Steelwind attacked von Sanctus with a Fire Bolt in the Common Room. He reacted by casting Force Cage to protect himself. Seeing that she couldn’t break through it, she started a fire to eat all of the oxygen in the room. Von Sanctus was probably helpless as he suffocated from a lack of oxygen.
translation: 在公共休息室，阿莉亚·斯蒂尔文德用火焰箭攻击了冯·桑克图斯。冯·桑克图斯尝试使用坚牢术自保。发现无法突破法术之后，阿莉亚纵火燃尽了室内氧气。冯·桑克图斯只能无助地因缺氧而窒息身亡。
context: { "reference name": "The Murder of Von Sanctus", "display name": "The Murder of Von Sanctus", "description": "Aria Steelwind attacked von Sanctus with a Fire Bolt in the Common Room. He reacted by casting Force Cage to protect himself. Seeing that she couldn’t break through it, she started a fire to eat all of the oxygen in the room. Von Sanctus was probably helpless as he suffocated from a lack of oxygen.", "type": "", "school": "", "incantation": "", "gesture": "", "duration": "", "concentration": "", "series": "", "tag": "", "token position": "", "battle map size": "" }

{ "reference name": "The Murder of Garrick Pierce", "display name": "The Murder of Garrick Pierce", "description": "The Inquisition found a frozen blade impaling Garrick Pierce through his heart. There were traces of transmutation on his blood. This implies that the murderer used Shape Liquid to create this blade and murder him. Which is oddly similar to how Pierce murdered Flinhart McCoy.\r\n\r\nBut why would the murderer do this when they clearly had more lethal spells at their disposal? Pierce used this method during Flinhart’s murder to leave as little evidence as possible. However, it’s clear the murderer wanted to frame Aria and leave as much evidence as possible.\r", "type": "", "school": "", "incantation": "", "gesture": "", "duration": "", "concentration": "", "series": "", "tag": "", "token position": "", "battle map size": "" }

original: The Inquisition found a frozen blade impaling Garrick Pierce through his heart. There were traces of transmutation on his blood. This implies that the murderer used Shape Liquid to create this blade and murder him. Which is oddly similar to how Pierce murdered Flinhart McCoy. But why would the murderer do this when they clearly had more lethal spells at their disposal? Pierce used this method during Flinhart’s murder to leave as little evidence as possible. However, it’s clear the murderer wanted to frame Aria and leave as much evidence as possible.
context: { "reference name": "The Murder of Garrick Pierce", "display name": "The Murder of Garrick Pierce", "description": "The Inquisition found a frozen blade impaling Garrick Pierce through his heart. { "reference name": "The Trapped King", "display name": "The Trapped King", "description": "At 2:00PM, Aster de Wyverngarde went to pay his respects at his father’s coffin. Unbeknownst to him, however, there was a Glyph of Contingency set to trap him inside a Force Cage. The trap triggered and Aster was trapped in that magical cage for its duration.\n\nThis caused the Kingsguard to consolidate their forces at Aster’s location. As a result, Lloyd von Sanctus, Coraline Sibyl, and Garrick Pierce were left with far fewer guards defending them.", "type": "", "school": "", "incantation": "", "gesture": "", "duration": "", "concentration": "", "series": "KingTrap", "tag": "", "token position": "", "battle map size": "" }

original: At 2:00PM, Aster de Wyverngarde went to pay his respects at his father’s coffin. Unbeknownst to him, however, there was a Glyph of Contingency set to trap him inside a Force Cage. The trap triggered and Aster was trapped in that magical cage for its duration. This caused the Kingsguard to consolidate their forces at Aster’s location. As a result, Lloyd von Sanctus, Coraline Sibyl, and Garrick Pierce were left with far fewer guards defending them.

original: At 2:00 PM, Aster de Wyverngarde went to pay his respects at his father’s coffin. Unbeknownst to him, however, there was a Glyph of Contingency set to trap him inside a Force Cage. The trap triggered and Aster was trapped in that magical cage for its duration. Aster attempted to break the Force Cage by casting Fire Bolt. This created fresh traces of evocation which makes it impossible to tell when the Glyph of Contingency was placed. There were traces of illusion magic at the crime scene. This might imply that someone hid themselves from the guards as they set this trap.

  "description": "Aria Steelwind has no memories of what happened after she left her meeting with Theon Archeus and Aster de Wyverngarde. There are only a few sentences at the bottom.\r\n\r\n“For the intentions of this contract, the person who hands the contract to Aria Steelwind will be referred to as ‘the Patron’. By signing this contract, Aria Steelwind surrenders her mind, body, and soul to the Patron. This contract will bind Aria Steelwind to the Patron so long as they both live.”\r\n\r\nIt’s signed with Aria’s signature…\r",

original:
The Blood Contract seems strange… Unlike Beatrice’s contract, it’s only one page. Even stranger, there’s a large empty space at the top half of the page. There are only a few sentences at the bottom.

“For the intentions of this contract, the person who hands the contract to Aria Steelwind will be referred to as ‘the Patron’. By signing this contract, Aria Steelwind surrenders her mind, body, and soul to the Patron. This contract will bind Aria Steelwind to the Patron so long as they both live.”

It’s signed with Aria’s signature…

Celeste McCoy saw Aria drop this Contract before she entered the Prayer room with Tyrion. Due to the Empress of Discord changing her memories, she can’t remember what was written on this Contract.

There are only a few sentences at the bottom.\r\n\r\n“For the intentions of this contract, the person who hands the contract to Aria Steelwind will be referred to as ‘the Patron’. By signing this contract, Aria Steelwind surrenders her mind, body, and soul to the Patron. This contract will bind Aria Steelwind to the Patron so long as they both live.”\r\n\r\nIt’s signed with Aria’s signature…\r\n\r\nCeleste McCoy saw Aria drop this Contract before she entered the Prayer room with Tyrion. {
  "reference name": "Celeste's Blood Contract",
  "display name": "Celeste's Blood Contract",
  "description": "\"With the apparent death of Tyrion Cuthbert, the Empress of Discord shall revive him, contingent upon the eternal servitude of Celeste McCoy. Henceforth, Celeste McCoy's soul shall be eternally bound to the Abyssal Hells.\r\n\r\nAs a part of her servitude, Celeste McCoy shall engage in actions deemed necessary to secure the compliance and cooperation of Aria Steelwind in the Empress’s endeavours.\r\n\r\nAnd lastly, it is stipulated that Celeste McCoy, of her own volition and agency, shall bring about the demise of Garrick Pierce by her own hand. Afterwards, Tyrion Cuthbert's consciousness will be restored.\"  \r",

original:
"With the apparent death of Tyrion Cuthbert, the Empress of Discord shall revive him, contingent upon the eternal servitude of Celeste McCoy. Henceforth, Celeste McCoy's soul shall be eternally bound to the Abyssal Hells.

As a part of her servitude, Celeste McCoy shall engage in actions deemed necessary to secure the compliance and cooperation of Aria Steelwind in the Empress’s endeavours.

And lastly, it is stipulated that Celeste McCoy, of her own volition and agency, shall bring about the demise of Garrick Pierce by her own hand. Afterwards, Tyrion Cuthbert's consciousness will be restored."
